build_systems.name: Tauri 2
build_systems.notes: Bundles frontend (Vite), Rust backend, and dacpac-extract sidecar. Identifier: com.vibedata.migration-utility. externalBin: binaries/dacpac-extract.

build_systems.name: GitHub Actions
build_systems.notes: ci.yml: frontend (Node 22, tsc, vitest) + Rust (cargo test, clippy). docs.yml: VitePress deploy. release.yml: multi-platform Tauri build.

test_frameworks.name: cargo test
test_frameworks.scope: Rust backend unit tests in app/src-tauri/src/

test_frameworks.name: pytest
test_frameworks.scope: Python DDL analysis tests in tests/ad-migration/migration/. Run via: cd agent-sources/ad-migration/workbench/migration/shared && uv run pytest

applications.name: Migration Utility Desktop
applications.description: Migrates Fabric Warehouse stored procedures to dbt models on Vibedata's platform. React frontend + Rust backend + dacpac-extract sidecar.

applications.name: ad-migration plugin
applications.description: DDL analysis and migration pipeline. Three sub-plugins: bootstrap, migration, test-generation. Loaded via: claude --plugin-path agent-sources/ad-migration

frontend_components.description: Reusable UI components. Files: github-login-dialog.tsx, icon-nav.tsx, step-progress.tsx. Sub-directories: settings/ (create-project-dialog, project-row, project-delete-dialog, project-reset-dialog, repo-selector, settings-panel-shell), ui/ (shadcn/ui primitives). Hooks: hooks/use-project-init.ts.

frontend_routes.description: Page-level route components: home.tsx, splash.tsx, settings/ directory (index.tsx, connections-tab.tsx, profile-tab.tsx, projects-tab.tsx).

frontend_stores.description: Zustand state stores: auth-store, project-store, settings-store.

frontend_lib.description: Utilities and shared types: branding.ts, date-utils.ts, logger.ts, path-utils.ts, tauri.ts (typed Tauri command wrappers), types.ts, utils.ts.

frontend_tests.description: Frontend unit/integration tests mirroring src/ structure.

rust_commands.description: Tauri command handlers: app_info.rs, ddl.rs, git_ops.rs, github_auth.rs, process.rs, project.rs, project_ops.rs, settings.rs. mod.rs re-exports.

rust_db.description: SQLite schema, migration runner, query helpers, and project repository layer (insert/get/list/delete). Migrations in app/src-tauri/migrations/ (4 numbered SQL files).

rust_support.description: Top-level Rust modules: lib.rs (Tauri setup), main.rs (entry), db.rs (database), logging.rs (structured logging), types.rs (shared Rust types).

plugin_marketplace.description: Plugin marketplace manifest defining 3 sub-plugins: bootstrap, migration, test-generation. Each plugin has a 'source' key pointing to its workbench directory.

plugin_bootstrap.description: Bootstrap sub-plugin. Commands: commands/init-ad-migration.md (prerequisite checker and installer), commands/init-dbt.md (dbt project scaffolding with adapter selection and sources.yml generation). Skills: skills/setup-ddl/ (DDL extraction from live SQL Server with catalog signals, DMF references, and AST enrichment).

plugin_migration.description: Migration sub-plugin. Contains shared Python library, DDL MCP server, MSSQL MCP config, skills, and agents.

shared_python.description: Python library for DDL analysis. Modules: loader.py (DDL parsing, sqlglot AST, GO-delimited block splitting), discover.py (catalog-mandatory list/show/refs CLI), catalog.py (catalog JSON I/O, routing flags, DMF row processing, flip_references), catalog_dmf.py (write_catalog_files orchestration), catalog_enrich.py (offline AST enrichment CLI — BFS call graph, SELECT INTO/TRUNCATE detection), export_ddl.py (SQL Server DDL export with --catalog flag, table signals, DMF extraction), setup_ddl.py (DDL setup orchestration), migrate.py (migration context assembly + dbt artifact writer CLI), dmf_processing.py (DMF row processing helpers), sql_types.py (SQL type mappings), ir.py (intermediate representation), dialect.py (sqlglot dialect registry), name_resolver.py (FQN normalization).

shared_schemas.description: JSON Schema files (21 total). Catalog schemas: table_catalog, procedure_catalog, view_catalog, function_catalog, manifest. Agent I/O: scope_input, candidate_writers, profiler_input, decomposer_input, planner_input, test_generator_input, migrator_input, decomposition_proposal, planner_design_manifest, fixture_manifest, migration_artifact_manifest, profile_context. Discover CLI output: discover_list_output, discover_show_output, discover_refs_output. Shared defs: common.json.

ddl_mcp.description: MCP server for structured DDL parsing. server.py exposes list_tables, get_table_schema, list_procedures, get_procedure_body, get_dependencies, list_views, get_view_body, list_functions, get_function_body.

mssql_mcp.description: genai-toolbox config for live SQL Server queries. tools.yaml defines mssql-execute-sql tool.

migration_skills.description: Skill definitions: discover/ (DDL exploration — list/show/refs from catalog), migrate/ (dbt model generation from stored procedures). setup-ddl is in the bootstrap sub-plugin.

migration_agents.description: Agent definitions: scoping-agent.md (catalog-based writer detection via discover refs), migrator-agent.md (batch dbt model generation from stored procedures).

migration_commands.description: Top-level orchestrator commands: migrate-table/ (end-to-end single-table migration pipeline — discover, profile, migrate, test-gen, validate).

tests_migration.description: Python pytest suite: test_discover.py, test_catalog.py, test_catalog_enrich.py, test_extract_refs.py, test_integration_catalog.py, test_smoke.py, test_migrate.py. Fixtures: ddl/, ddl_unparseable/, discover/flat/ (with catalog/ subdirectory), discover/unparseable/, catalog/ (table and procedure JSON fixtures), migrate/ (DDL, catalog with profiles/statements, dbt project fixture), sql/ (Docker SQL Server setup scripts).

tests_scoping_agent.description: TypeScript vitest suite: scoping-agent.test.ts. Fixtures: 8 scenario directories (ambiguous-multi-writer, call-graph, error-cross-db, no-writer-found, partial, resolved, target-is-view, writer-through-view).

e2e_tests.description: Playwright E2E tests. Sub-directories: helpers/, home/, settings/, workspace/.

scripts.description: Developer scripts: build-dacpac-extract.sh, link-worktree-db.sh, publish-test-db-image.sh, restore-dw-samples.sh, sql/ (test DB creation scripts and JSON fixtures).

docs.description: VitePress documentation. Sub-directories: design/ (agent-contract, branding, overall-design, setup-ddl, sp-to-dbt-plugin, test-scenario, tsql-parse-classification, unit-test-strategy), reference/ (agent-instructions-governance, local-agent-testing, setup-docker, test-db-image), requirements/, user-guide/.

key_directories.app/src/: Frontend React/TypeScript runtime (components, routes, stores, lib, styles, tests)
key_directories.app/src-tauri/src/: Rust backend runtime (Tauri commands, DB, logging, types)
key_directories.app/src-tauri/migrations/: SQLite schema migrations (4 numbered SQL files)
key_directories.app/dacpac-extract/: C# sidecar for DACPAC extraction (bundled as externalBin)
key_directories.agent-sources/ad-migration/: Claude Code plugin marketplace (bootstrap + migration + test-generation sub-plugins)
key_directories.agent-sources/ad-migration/workbench/mig: Python DDL analysis library (uv project, sqlglot-based)
JSON Schema files for catalog, agent I/O, discover CLI output, and shared definitions
key_directories.tests/ad-migration/migration/: Python pytest tests for shared library (discover, catalog, catalog_enrich, extract_refs, integration)
key_directories.tests/ad-migration/scoping-agent/: TypeScript vitest tests for scoping agent
key_directories.docs/design/: Architecture decision records and design specs
key_directories..claude/rules/: Shared agent rules (8 policy files: coding-conventions, db-schema-change, frontend-design, git-workflow, logging-policy, rust-backend, agent-sidecar, codex-execution-policy)
key_directories..claude/skills/: Workflow playbooks for Claude Code CLI skills (6 skills)

conventions.rust: Standard Rust conventions, clippy enforced. Every Tauri command logs info! on entry, error! on failure.
conventions.commits: Granular — one concern per commit. Stage specific files (git add <file>, not git add .).

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring code. It is the primary startup context for structure, entrypoints, modules, and commands.
notes_for_agents.db_location: Database is at Tauri app_data_dir()/migration-utility.db. macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/com.vibedata.migration-utility/migration-utility.db
notes_for_agents.plugin_loading: Load the ad-migration plugin with: claude --plugin-path agent-sources/ad-migration. CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT points to the active sub-plugin root (e.g. workbench/bootstrap/ or workbench/migration/).
notes_for_agents.ddl_filenames: The loader auto-detects object types from CREATE statements — .sql filenames are not significant. Any directory of .sql files works.
notes_for_agents.catalog_mandatory: discover.py requires catalog/ files from setup-ddl. Errors if catalog is missing. No AST fallback.
notes_for_agents.parse_errors: sqlglot parse failures are hard errors (DdlParseError). The loader does not silently skip unparseable DDL.
notes_for_agents.python_tests: Run from shared dir: cd agent-sources/ad-migration/workbench/migration/shared && uv run pytest. Integration tests (Docker SQL Server): uv run pytest -m integration
notes_for_agents.mssql_env_vars: Live SQL Server access requires MSSQL_HOST, MSSQL_PORT, MSSQL_DB, SA_PASSWORD exported before launching claude.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever you change architecture, entrypoints, commands, modules, or package structure.
